response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with 17+ years of broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices domains, but lacks the domain-specific expertise central to this role. There is no evidence of work in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, growth measurement, telemetry pipelines, or statistical experimental analysis. The role demands a Principal/IC6 specialist with deep experimentation systems pedigree and cross-team platform ownership; this resume describes a strong generalist without that specialization.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience including high-throughput microservices (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), demonstrating production scalability exposure
Polyglot background spanning TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C, C++, Java, and others, with current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship culture evidenced by TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and community mentoring through workshops and conference talks
concerns: No experimentation platform experience whatsoever — no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, rollout automation, bias detection, or guardrail systems anywhere in the resume
No growth engineering or telemetry/metrics infrastructure background; no mention of funnels, conversion metrics, instrumentation pipelines, or data science collaboration
Currently titled Senior/Staff Software Engineer with no indication of Principal-level scope, cross-team architectural ownership, or IC6-caliber multi-workstream technical leadership

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth platform experience
